title: Nursery Rhyme. CLX. Songs.
content:
Hot-cross Buns!
                Hot-cross Buns!
        One a penny, two a penny
                Hot-cross Buns!

                Hot-cross Buns!
                Hot-cross Buns!
        If ye have no daughters,
                Give them to your sons.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CLX. Songs.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
